articles.title: Nigerian airstrike leaves 200 feared dead in Yobe, councillor and residents say

articles.title: I vibe coded a feed reading web app. It was enlightening and uncomfortable
articles.summary:
AI-assisted software development is transforming the industry, but you already knew that

articles.title: Why Is It So Hard to Fix an Electric Bike? (2026)

articles.title: Growing void between enterprise and frontier AI puts open weights models in the spotlight

articles.title: South Korea introduces universal basic mobile data access

articles.title: Two different attackers poisoned popular open source tools - and showed us the future of supply chain compromise
articles.summary:
Time to start dropping SBOMs

FEATURE  Two supply chain attacks in March infected open source tools with malware and used this access to steal secrets from tens of thousands – if not more – organizations. We won't know the full blast radius for months.…
articles.reasoning: The article details supply chain attacks where attackers compromised open-source tools to steal secrets from organizations, which is a direct method of gathering sensitive information from a wide range of targets.

articles.title: How the Internet Broke Everyone’s Bullshit Detectors
